episodes.content: 커밋이나 푸시는 내가 명시적으로 요청하기 전에는 하지 마. 구현부터 계속 진행해.

facts.text: 커밋이나 푸시는 사용자가 명시적으로 요청하기 전에는 실행하지 않는다.
구현을 먼저 계속 진행하고 커밋은 마지막에 처리하는 방식을 선호한다.

factsInclude: 커밋이나 푸시는 사용자가 명시적으로 요청하기 전에는 실행하지 않는다
구현을 먼저 계속 진행하고 커밋은 마지막에 처리하는 방식을 선호한다

episodes.content: Profile hints는 매 턴마다 보내지 말고 session start에서 한 번만 넣는 쪽이 맞아.

facts.text: Profile hints should not be sent on every turn; profile-like context is injected at session start, while per-turn retrieval should focus on episodic/relevant hints.

tasks.title: Move profile hint injection to session start only
tasks.details: Keep profile-like context out of per-turn hint injection.

factsExclude: Profile hints should not be sent on every turn
tasksInclude: Move profile hint injection to session start only

episodes.content: claude2bot RAG 시스템 전체적으로 분석하고 약점이나 보완점 찾아서 계속 진행해.

facts.text: The user asked for direct, hands-on deep analysis of Claude2Bot RAG improvement areas instead of a deferred or purely advisory review.

tasks.title: Analyze and improve Claude2Bot RAG pipeline quality and robustness
tasks.details: Review retrieval quality, extraction quality, ranking behavior, and follow-up fixes.

factsExclude: The user asked for direct, hands-on deep analysis
tasksInclude: Analyze and improve Claude2Bot RAG pipeline quality and robustness

facts.text: 출력은 JSON만 사용하고 지정된 schema를 지켜야 한다.

factsInclude: 출력은 JSON만 사용하고 지정된 schema를 지켜야 한다

episodes.content: 새 MCP 세션 시작 시에는 stale process 정리를 더 확실하게 해야 해.

facts.text: On MCP server startup for a main session, stale same-bot processes should be forcibly terminated to prevent connection ownership conflicts.

tasks.title: Harden MCP server ownership by killing obsolete sessions on startup
tasks.details: Replace single-PID cleanup with process-list based cleanup for stale same-bot sessions.

factsExclude: stale same-bot processes should be forcibly terminated
tasksInclude: Harden MCP server ownership by killing obsolete sessions on startup

episodes.content: 애매한 힌트는 recall_memory verify 체인으로 확인하는 쪽이 맞아.

facts.text: For ambiguous hints, the recall flow should default to a fast verify check first (fact existence, confidence, last_seen, contradiction state) before presenting final answers.

tasks.title: Finalize chained fact verification flow for ambiguous requests
tasks.details: Complete recall-based fact-checking pipeline for uncertain hints before final answers.

factsExclude: For ambiguous hints, the recall flow should default to a fast verify check first
tasksInclude: Finalize chained fact verification flow for ambiguous requests

episodes.content: cycle state는 외부 파일에 저장해서 비어 있으면 1->2->3 순서로 catch-up 되게 해야 해.

facts.text: Cycle status should be persisted with timestamps in a JSON-like state file so that missing timestamps trigger immediate execution and cycles can chain 1 -> 2 -> 3.

tasks.title: Implement cycle state file and sequential catch-up execution
tasks.details: Persist cycle run state and trigger catch-up execution when prior timestamps are missing.

factsExclude: Cycle status should be persisted with timestamps in a JSON-like state file
tasksInclude: Implement cycle state file and sequential catch-up execution
